Author: The Enceladeum
Name: HOutfits
Punchline: Apply full sets to your character in Glamourer with a single click.
Description: Lists the game's complete named sets and applies a whole set or any single piece to your character through Glamourer, instead of picking each item from a dropdown.
Changelog: 0.2.0: new "NPCs" tab. Browse the game's named NPCs and apply an NPC's appearance, gear, or both to your character through Glamourer; optionally take the NPC's name too (requires HMoniker). A Revert button restores your own character. The outfit-set list is unchanged.

Author: The Enceladeum
Name: Cosmic Claw
Description: Play the Cosmic Predator's Magitek Claw Sweep animation on demand, once or on a loop, while you're riding it. Purely cosmetic and local-only; nothing is sent to the server. Works on both the Cosmic Predator and the standard Magitek Predator. Commands: /clawsweep and /clawsweeploop.
Changelog: 0.1.1: loop now repeats until toggled off; also works on the standard Magitek Predator (mount 121); tidier command help and quieter chat.

Author: The Enceladeum
Name: HMoniker
Description: Changes your display name. Local only: visible only to yourself outside of HMS (HMapSync) sessions.
Changelog: 1.3.0: names are now stored per character in their own file, so two game clients on separate accounts no longer share one list or overwrite each other. The settings window shows just the character you're logged in as (log in to another to edit its name), and the name fields wrap onto new lines as the window narrows. Existing names migrate automatically on first load.

Author: The Enceladeum
Name: Begone!
Punchline: Out of sight, out of mind.
Description: Hide NPCs with a single click
Changelog: 0.2.1: shortened the installer description to a one-liner; the full write-up now lives in the plugin's own window (open with /begone). No functional changes.
